nasb.text: So Moses and Aaron and the leaders of the congregation numbered the sons of the Kohathites by their families and by their fathers’ households,

esv.text: And Moses and Aaron and the chiefs of the congregation listed the sons of the Kohathites, by their clans and their fathers’ houses,

cnv.text: 摩西、亞倫和會眾的領袖們，把哥轄的子孫，按著他們的宗族和父家，

ccb.text: 于是，摩西、亚伦和会众的首领按宗族和家系统计哥辖的子孙，
